programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: Supernanny: Ostler Family
programme.desc: The Ostler's are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child.

programme.title: Supernanny: Garcia Family
programme.desc: Stay at home dad, Anthony Garcia is struggling to understand his new role as the primary caregiver, while mom, Bethanie, can't find her work, life balance.

programme.title: Movie: Just Wright
programme.desc: A physical therapist falls for the basketball player she is helping recover from an injury.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Disappearance
programme.desc: When a girl disappears from church, investigators fear a stalker is preying on children.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purebread Murder
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered after years of domestic abuse. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit. But the evidence which will conclusively tie the killer to the crime is on a freshly baked hamburger bun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A high school student vanishes without a trace. False leads force detectives to work double time until a prostitute's murder demands police attention and the possibility arises that the same killer may have struck twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skeleton Key
programme.desc: Police think an abusive ex-boyfriend is to blame for a young woman's disappearance, but a set of keys discovered in her vehicle don't match up with either the ex-boyfriend or the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Breaking Ground
programme.desc: The Browns break ground on their remote land in Alaska. In the middle of floating the foundation pilings to their land, they are set back when a big storm hits. Matt, the oldest brother, creates his very own home.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Moving Day
programme.desc: The Browns move into their new home. Matt constructs a one-of-a-kind tire house, and celebrates his independence after living in the same house as the family for 32 years. Ami works with an Alaskan matchmaker to find mates for her five grown boys.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Light it Up
programme.desc: Matt and Noah attempt to bring electricity to Browntown. Billy and some of the boys make their way home on their newest boat.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Bear, the Great Hunter
programme.desc: The Browns come together to prepare for the winter while Ami nurses an injury. Bear stretches his legs as hunt leader while climbing up the alpine with Birdie and Gabe in search of deer.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: All or Nothing
programme.desc: After some time away, the Browns prepare to get Browntown back on track. Prospects are lean due to a skiff that's out of commission, leaving the family faced with a risky all-or-nothing haul as their only solution.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back To The Wild: Big Time Browntown
programme.desc: Noah, Billy and the rest of the Wolfpack embark on a variety of projects intended to repair and expand Browntown. Risky hauls, ambitious projects and new ventures make for an exciting, though busy, life for the Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: The Wolfpack prepares for a bush wedding as the first major storm of the season approaches. They share untold stories and address fans' burning questions, exposing their world like never before.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Call to Action
programme.desc: Bird and Gabe take action as a hungry predator encroaches deeper into North Star Ranch. In his effort to finally break ground on his homestead, Bam must play nice with his siblings. Gabe has a surprise in store for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Poor Man's Mine
programme.desc: A third-generation miner has big dreams of re-opening his father's silver mine, but unsafe conditions call for backup. Alex and Kevin negotiate a deal to restore the mine in hopes of getting it up and running and possibly cashing in.

programme.title: Tougher Than It Looks: Balance
programme.desc: Andrew tries to hang ten as he tackles winter surfing, attempts to ride the waves of a FloRider in Florida, and tries to stay balanced as he drops into the skateboard half-pipe.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Legends in a Kayak
programme.desc: Jimmy and Roland Martin are kayak-fishing in Florida.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Peacock Bass on the Amazon
programme.desc: We fish for peacock bass on the Amazon River.

programme.desc: George and Ariel Medero fish in the Florida Keys, and begin with trip by 'yellowtailing'.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island From Hell
programme.desc: Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian Island for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Skunk Time
programme.desc: Combating sickness and no food, a stay-at-home mom and a trucker come together to try and survive in a Philippine forest. Desperate to ward off hunger, they end up eating a skunk.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: To Eat or Not to Eat
programme.desc: The hot and hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savanna challenge two survivalists. They battle health issues, a team breakdown and struggle to find anything to eat, leading to desperate measures.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Drink Drink Drink
programme.desc: Dehydration quickly sets in for a California surfer girl and a Louisiana hunter on a deserted island in the Philippines. The struggle to secure a water source threatens their chances of survival.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Food for Thought
programme.desc: Two survivalists manage to make fire and create a water delivery system in Madagascar. Finding a food source proves more challenging and with weeks to go, they are forced to sample some unexpected fare.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Armadillo for Breakfast

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Back to the Big Dig

programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Made Me Laugh
programme.desc: Vanessa Fraction spots a 70's sitcom star in the crowd, Rojo Perez makes an inappropriate exit, and Tone Bell reads a crowd member's mind.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Where's the Bathroom?

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Russian Interference
programme.desc: Gina Yashere obsesses over the contents of a crowd member's pants, Joel Kim Booster knows exactly what not to say as a Pilates teacher, and Dave Hill tries a unique style of crowd work.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: I Hate Myself
programme.desc: On this show, we learn three things: don't let Mo Amer call 911, don't ask Jenny Zigrino how you look, and never let Mo Mandel speak to the audience.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Future
programme.desc: Unregulated food expiration dates lead to massive waste, your 401K won't be enough to support your retirement and the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Science
programme.desc: Testing mice means wasted resources because what works on them often fails on humans. Scarce funding stops scientists from seeking cures, and there's no money in reproducing results, even though it's essential in proving findings.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Halloween
programme.desc: Strangers with poisoned candy don't exist, the panic over Orson Welles' War of the Worlds broadcast didn't happen and mediums are total frauds.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Spa Day
programme.desc: Pricey detox treatments may do more harm than good, MSG's scary reputation is undeserved and the placebo effect is way more powerful than one may think.

programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Sex and the City: What's Sex Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Samantha actually begins to date someone that she likes; Miranda opts for celibacy.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ghost Town
programme.desc: Charlotte's battle with her mother-in-law explodes; Samantha's relationship gets a boost.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Anchors Away
programme.desc: The girls try to come to terms with Miranda's new life with Brady; Carrie meets a sailor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin
programme.desc: Samantha gets back together with Richard; Carrie has a dry spell in her love life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Luck Be an Old Lady
programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Cover Girl
programme.desc: Samantha offers to help Carrie with her book cover; Charlotte shops on-line.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Plus One Is the Loneliest Number
programme.desc: Samantha organizes Carrie's book-launch party; Miranda doesn't tell her date about Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Critical Condition
programme.desc: Carrie obsesses over a comment made about Aidan; Samantha baby-sits Brady.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Journey
programme.desc: Hoping to see Big, Carrie travels to a book reading in San Francisco with Samantha.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Love a Charade
programme.desc: The girls head to the Hamptons for the memorable wedding of a supposedly gay singer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: To Market, to Market
programme.desc: Carrie calms her nerves over a first date with a fellow author by going on another date.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Great Sexpectations
programme.desc: Carrie is disappointed by Jack's lacklustre performance between the sheets.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Perfect Present
programme.desc: Carrie spends a sleepless night at Berger's apartment; Samantha meets her waiter again.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Pick a Little, Talk a Little
programme.desc: Berger reacts poorly to Carrie's criticism; Charlotte and Harry have an argument.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Lights, Camera, Relationship
programme.desc: Carrie's success makes Berger uncomfortable; Samantha adds buzz for Smith's play.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: A Family Recovering From Tragedy
programme.desc: Robert Irvine returns to De Rican Chef in Virginia Beach, Virginia, where three years ago he found a family in crisis following a tragic death. Owner Raquel had lost her passion for cooking, her son Ruben was lashing out at the employees.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: New Roles, New Results
programme.desc: Robert comes to the rescue of Foxfire Grill in Alexandria, Va., where the owners, Terri and Jackie, simply can't figure out why they aren't making money. The restaurant has a good location, the owners are smart and they work hard.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet, Savory and Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are in for a culinary adventure. In Bakersfield, Calif., the classic cafe dishing out meaty Texas chili and decadent pumpkin pancakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef It Up
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's divin' into menus boasting the bomb beef.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: Guy visits one of his favourite places in Seattle from the very first season to see what's new for breakfast and lunch. In Minneapolis, Cuban cuisine has taken off since DDD visited, and in Portland, Oregon, two dudes still crank out crazy sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: It's a mix of land and sea as Guy Fieri pops into a few favourite spots across the country. In Portland, Ore., a chef full of personality is still making people smile with seafood for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Passport of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into killer cuisine with international flair. In Lansing he checks out a Middle Eastern joint that puts out serious shawarma and gangster grape leaves. Plus, a Vietnamese spot is serving real-deal spring rolls and brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat And Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Meat Mashup
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is reliving his most meat-tastic memories, starting in Kansas City, Mo., at an award-winning BBQ joint serving up pork belly burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Bites And Southern Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing some barbecue and Southern comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fusion Of Flavors
programme.desc: In Chicago, a saucy spot mashes up Latin and Asian, putting a unique spin on paella and posole. A comfort food joint in Seattle fires things up with Nashville hot chicken.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sophie's Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Bobby Flay and his daughter Sophie are huge sports fans. After video-chatting with each other about this football season, Bobby makes a brunch perfect for tailgating with apple crisp French toast casserole and an easy frittata sandwich.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Big Game Day
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has an all-star lineup of chefs cooking game day grub in his ranch kitchen. Alex Guarnaschelli serves finger foods like the classic Pigs in a Blanket.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Touchdown!
programme.desc: Valerie kicks off football season with white chicken chili and toppings bar, a football cheese ball with herbed crackers, green salad with champagne vinaigrette, toffee buckeyes and a bloody bull cocktail with a spicy pickled okra and green bean garnish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Football, Football, Football
programme.desc: Ree whips up chicken nachos two-ways for the family to eat after the homecoming parade. Then she's off to her boys' football games armed with chocolate chunk cookies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big Game, Big Food!
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking mega with big food for the big game. She kicks things off with her bodacious burger, a stacked sandwich with tiers of quick and easy mac and cheese, onion Strings and terrific toppings.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quarterback Training
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is hoping to score big with dinner for the boys after quarterback training. She's making Ranch chicken taquitos with sour cream ranch dip, hearty Mexican rice and beans, Southwestern broccoli dippers with cheese sauce and a kit for delicious.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: College Rivals
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares awesome football food inspired by her college rival daughters.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hockey Game!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, host a hockey party for their sports-loving friends. She makes all her favourites, including crispy fried chicken sandwiches with super-creamy chipotle mayo and homemade noodles.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Winging It and Beyond
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves everything about football season, especially the halftime feast. This year's big game features new takes on old favorites, and Valerie is joined by actor Angela Kinsey, her husband, Josh Snyder and food writers Jo Stougaard.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Big Game Bites
programme.desc: Kardea is having her football-loving family over to watch the big game, and they all love to eat! Kardea is going deep into her delicious playbook to make fried chicken wings with a variety of dipping sauces, southern deviled eggs and chips 'n' crab dip.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Football Picnic
programme.desc: Before the big game, Giada De Laurentiis and her family and friends spend the day on the beach playing tag football and having an oceanside picnic. Giada serves an array of decadent picnic foods that not only feed a crowd but are perfect for game day.

programme.title: Guy's Big Game
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hosting a big event on Super Bowl weekend. No one loves the big game more than Guy, and he really loves the food he gets to make and enjoy with family and friends while they watch. Guy wants to make sure that football fans are celebrating.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Fighting Fate
programme.desc: Izuku's mind is swirling with feelings from his work study, so he goes talks to All Might about it and learns about All Might's fate.

programme.desc: When the restaurant gets a bad review from a food critic, the Belchers fear that the negative press will keep customers away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Bad Tina
programme.desc: Tina starts hanging out with bad girl Tammy in an effort to get closer to Jimmy Junior.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Boys in the Band
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian form a children's band that quickly rises to fame, until they let a girl get between them and drive the band apart. Meanwhile, Peter and Lois insist that Chris get a job, so he takes a job managing Quagmire's sex life.

programme.title: Family Guy: Bookie of the Year
programme.desc: Brian and Lois decide it's time for Chris to work out his anger management issues by taking up a sport. Chris surprises everyone and becomes a star baseball pitcher, which turns Peter into a gambling father, as he bets on his son’s baseball games.

programme.title: My Hero Academia: Lemillion
programme.desc: The League of Villains stay true to their name in their fight. Meanwhile, Togata catches up to Chisaki and Eri first.

programme.title: Dr. Stone: Spartan Crafts Club

programme.title: Fire Force: The Burning Past

programme.title: Food Wars! Shokugeki no Soma: The Age of Kings

programme.title: Life: Plants

programme.title: Life: Primates

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.desc: Kevin Cooper was sentenced to death for the murders of four people in the Chino Hills massacre of 1983, but as investigators look back at the DNA evidence, more questions are raised about Cooper's possible innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Was Kevin Cooper Framed?
programme.desc: '48 Hours' investigates whether new DNA evidence can save the life of a man on death row for killing four people in California. Twenty years ago he wrote '48 Hours' claiming he was framed, and new tests may answer that question.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mysterious Death of Casey Kasem
programme.desc: Four years after his death, a family feud erupts over radio legend Casey Kasem and exactly how he died and who was responsible. An estate that could be worth $100 million is at stake.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Unfriendly Community
programme.desc: One June morning cleaning lady Myra heads into the property office and is confronted by a nightmare scene. The office has been ransacked and there is blood everywhere- property manager Melinda Schaefer is dead. Police work hard to get justice.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: Sandy Berfield was killed Jan 20, 2000. She suffered years of harassment from a co-worker and finally had him jailed for violating a restraining order. Released, he sent her a bomb. Steve Caruso was sentenced to life in prison with no parole.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Accident
programme.desc: High school baseball coach Russell Stager is only separated from his wife for a few months when he meets Barbara. But less than a decade later, marital bliss will be replaced with a web of lies and betrayal that will push someone over the edge.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Watery Grave
programme.desc: Jeff and Jeanine Glanda have a picture-perfect family until selfishness and a shameless affair mark the beginning of the end. As money troubles and the threat of divorce breed paranoia and hate, a plot is hatched in the dark heart of a twisted killer.

programme.title: Outlaw Biker Gangs
programme.desc: A look back at when leather clad hoods turned the motorcycle into a symbol of violence.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: The Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. But by the early 2000's evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Tanks
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest tanks in history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Fighting Forces
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest fighting forces in history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Commanders
programme.desc: This is the story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of the second Iraq conflict.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Past, Present and Future
programme.desc: A couple's Belle Island camp has a long multi-generational history within their family spanning nearly 100 years. Their camp is an ongoing focus of family life and they are now ready to make its preservation their main priority.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.desc: The exterior of the Detroit mansion has become run-down. In addition to replacing the landscaping and creating planter beds for an herb garden, they build an entertainment area complete with a pergola and a firepit.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Jamestown, NY
programme.desc: The Dawgs return to Jamestown, NY, for their second go at salvaging a home that's been expanded to create a 26,000-square-foot Moose Lodge. The mixed architecture turns over an array of treasures, including neon lights and ornate roofing tiles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From a Foursquare Farmhouse in Roanoke, VA
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew take on a foursquare farmhouse in Roanoke, VA. Key items include colonnades, pocket doors, and a large front door. Back at the shop, Mike works on building a tailgater grill unit for a customer.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: New Jersey Mansion
programme.desc: The crew fights through layers of extravagant remodeling to salvage a governor's mansion in Livingston, NJ. The 1900s home challenges the team with unusual design nuances and well-built features. Later, Mike and Tay work on a build for a local bar.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nelson House
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew saves pieces of a house in Mt. Jackson, VA. Their main focus is on the clay-fired roof and on the oversized cornice bracket.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bemis Cotton Mill
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the rest of the team salvage the Bemis Cotton Mill in Jackson, TN. Key finds include fire doors, earthenware sinks, factory carts, and a gang sink. At the warehouse, Mike builds a bookshelf using the panels from a door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the amusement park attraction, Geyser Gulch, at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items include a water tower, air pressure guns, and a blue slide. While at the shop, Mike builds a hostess stand for a local restaurant.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Old Stagecoach Inn
programme.desc: Hosts Mike & Robert salvage a house previously damaged by a tornado near Abingdon, VA. Key items include floors, doors, and a complete staircase. While at the warehouse, Mike makes a commissioned desk for a child from a balance beam.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Marion Bowling Alley
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to Marion, Virginia, to salvage a soon-to-be renovated bowling alley. However, the bowling alley floor turns out to be far heavier than they anticipated.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Killer Views
programme.desc: A family of four build their dream home overlooking the Atlantic Ocean on the eastern most point in the United States in Lubec, Maine. Later, a pro snowboarder and his wife prepare to move from their yurt in Whitefish to build their off-grid home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.desc: Come see what's between the buns at these burger joints that are taking the American classic to the next level. Whether it's with foie gras in Philly, pimento cheese in Atlanta, umami in Los Angeles or truffles in New York.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Ice Cream
programme.desc: If you like ice cream, you will be wowed by these unique treats. How about bourbon and corn flakes flavoured scoops at Humphry Slocombe? Or the sweets at Sweet Rose Creamery where everything from the cones to the chocolate chips are made from scratch.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Sandwiches
programme.desc: Jewish Deli in New York serves up their signature smoked meat; unique sandwiches.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Key West
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern delights in the fun and funky flavors of Key West, Florida. From conch fritters, coconut pink shrimp and fried hogfish sandwiches to toasty Cubanos and quintessential Key lime pie, Key West is full of fresh eats and local ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City
programme.desc: Andrew digs in to Panama City's classic tastes inspired by the blended cultures that make up the capital city's population. From fried whole fish and plantains to citric ceviche and yucca fritters, the Latin flair of this city seasons every dish.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Barcelona
programme.desc: Andrew takes us to Barcelona, a coastal city that draws its edible inspiration directly from the mountains and sea. From tapas to crema Catalana, the foods of this Mediterranean city reflect history and culture in every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Lady Liberty Cake

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: The Purr-Fect Birthday Cake

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fierce, Festive Cakes

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Legendary, Adventure Cakes

programme.title: Movie: Valkyrie
programme.desc: A plot to assassinate Hitler begins when German officers and politicians see the downfall of Germany coming. All is arranged, but things start to go wrong and turn the plan into a tragedy.

programme.title: Movie: Aquaman
programme.desc: A man learns that he is the half-human, half-Atlantean heir to an undersea kingdom that is ruled by his half-brother who plans to wage a devastating war on the surface world, forcing him to become a leader and challenge his brother for the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.title: The Outsider: Que Viene El Coco
programme.desc: This drama explores the investigation into the gruesome murder of a local boy.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: A cyber-doctor finds parts of an abandoned cyborg with its human brain still intact in a trash heap, builds it a new body and treats it like a daughter, but when other cyborgs come to destroy her she finds that she possesses incredible fighting abilities.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
programme.desc: Comedian, actor, writer and producer Lil Rel Howery ('Insecure', 'Get Out') makes his HBO stand-up comedy debut in an uproarious hour-long special.

programme.title: Movie: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Many years after a global cataclysm, civilization's remnants live in mobile predator-cities that consume all in their path. With the world's resources running out, it falls to a mysterious young woman to face her past and defeat the biggest city all.

programme.title: Movie: Van Helsing
programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Movie: Breakthrough
programme.desc: After falling through the ice on a frozen lake, a boy is without a pulse for nearly 45 minutes, but with the help of doctors he makes a miraculous recovery that strengthens his and his family's faith.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Movie: Glass
programme.desc: A man with multiple personalities, including one with superhuman strength and a brutal nature, joins forces with a super-genius to reveal to the world that comic book villains are real, but they're opposed by a loving father with incredible strength.

programme.title: Movie: Rise of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The prequel to the Hollywood classic, Planet of the Apes, begins in San Francisco when man's attempts to push the boundaries of science results in the rise of genetically modified apes who threaten to take over the world.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Fingerbutt
programme.desc: A fashionable older woman agrees to model in an ad campaign while a veterinarian suffering from depression experiments with micro-dosing mushrooms.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Dongle
programme.desc: A construction worker develops a crush at the same time a young roller-blader tries to save a fireworks display. Meanwhile, The Guy and Lee attend a themed boat party.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Proxy
programme.desc: A couple adjusts to life with a special delivery; The Guy hangs with a young nanny.

programme.title: High Maintenance
programme.desc: A marijuana deliveryman drops his product off to clients in New York City.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: A luxury cruise vessel travels the solar system in this sci-fi comedy.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Movie: The Darjeeling Limited
programme.desc: Three brothers reunite and set out on a spiritual journey to find themselves.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher
programme.desc: The outspoken comedian discusses hot topics.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: Hail, Caesar!
programme.desc: A 1950's Hollywood fixer for a movie company cleans up after big names and stars in the industry, but must deal with more than fixing problems when a star disappears.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen
programme.desc: After a horrific attack leaves him broken and with no memories, Mark Hogancamp copes with his painful and confusing life by building a miniature replica of a World War II village, complete with resident dolls that resemble himself and his friends.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.desc: Jesse strikes out against Walt's advice. Fearing for Jesse's safety, Walt takes drastic action to intervene. A tragic event leads to a shocking confrontation.

programme.title: Breaking Bad: Full Measure
programme.desc: With Jesse on the run and Mike in hot pursuit, Walt negotiates a bargain with Gus and concocts a disturbing plan to provide for his and Jesse's safety.

programme.desc: Will and Carlton try to concentrate on their schoolwork while surrounded by distractions.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Who's the Boss

programme.desc: Follow four women who share one common bond: their connection to the hip-hop world.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Messy Boots

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Some Sticky Big Bizness
programme.desc: Yandy pitches her business plan to the Mayor of Newark. Joe Budden and Tahiry explore a new relationship. Newcomer Jennaske pits Rich Dollaz against Phresher. Erica Mena discovers a text that jeopardizes her wedding. And Chrissy confronts Yandy.

programme.title: Love and Hip-Hop: Ex’s & Oh’s
programme.desc: Safaree is forced to set things right to save his wedding. Cyn confronts Erica about her plan to match Tahiry back with Joe. Phresher must fight to keep Jennaske from jumping ship after Jen's public explosion. Remy goes to Miami to finish her album.

programme.title: Cat Bowl II
programme.desc: Adult cats from past 'Kitten Bowls' come together for an all-star game.

programme.title: Kitten Bowl VII
programme.desc: A feline catstravaganza that showcases adoptable pets as teams battle it out for the win.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: Portland interior designer Julia adopts a dog and seeks the help of expert and handsome dog trainer Owen. The two begin to fall for each other.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A young woman falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with injury.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Charlie's Buddy
programme.desc: A wartime buddy of Rose's late husband arrives in Miami to see Rose. However, he has more in mind than just a friendly visit. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Blanche haggle over the same dress to wear to a social event.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche's Little Girl
programme.desc: Blanche is thrilled by a visit from her daughter, Rebecca, an ex-model who has now gained quite a bit of weight. Also visiting with Rebecca is her oafish beau who constantly puts down her weight.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dorothy's New Friend
programme.desc: Dorothy befriends a novelist, Barbara Thorndyke, and she quickly infringes on Dorothy's relationship with Blanche and Rose, who think Barbara is nothing but a stuck up snob.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Grab That Dough
programme.desc: The girls fly to Los Angeles to appear on their favourite game show.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: My Brother My Father
programme.desc: Sophia's brother, Angelo, a priest, is coming to Miami for a visit and he doesn't know Dorothy and Stan are divorced. So in order to spare his feelings, Sophia convinces Dorothy and Stan to pretend to be married.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz's Turn
programme.desc: When Roz decides to audition for her own radio show, Frasier mistakenly tells his agent, Bebe, that he would be sad to see Roz go. Frasier is outraged when Bebe tells the station manager that Frasier would quit if Roz got her own show.

programme.title: Frasier: Ham Radio
programme.desc: Frasier volunteers to recreate the radio station's first ever mystery play, but disaster looms when his only professional actor quits. Family and friends help Frasier as he struggles to perform each role.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Dates and a Breakup

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne Hates Sherry

programme.title: Frasier: Are You Being Served?

programme.desc: Arthur finds himself in a bit of a quandary when he tries to sell his extra burial plot.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Funeral Services
programme.desc: A son calls 9-1-1 after finding his father dead in their home. When investigators arrive, an unknown male suspect is inside, but ballistic evidence points to someone else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Expert Witness
programme.desc: A woman's tragedy may help bring closure to a 13-year-old case where a young mother was brutally sexually assaulted and killed in her own apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Micro-Clues
programme.desc: When a boy is found dead in a cornfield, traces of water from his body help lead investigators to the boy's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites
programme.desc: In the spring of 1993, an unexplained illness struck the residents of Milwaukee, Wisconsin. Health officials suspected it was influenza, but it proved to be more serious and more difficult to identify.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Swamp Things
programme.desc: Two survivalists struggle in the Louisiana swamps. Mosquitoes and other deadly animals threaten their survival, but also offer sustenance. As starvation sets in, the pair find themselves considering all their options.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Just Try It
programme.desc: Enduring constant threats from predators, two survivalists struggle in the Louisiana swamps and endure constant threats from predators. They desperately try to secure food in the harsh conditions, forcing them to try some unexpected fare.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Making a Killing
programme.desc: A former cop and a self-described wild child clash in the Panamanian jungle. Forced to rely on one another, survival instincts kick into gear when one of them succumbs to the rigors of the wild. The other must forage, trap and kill to survive.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Gruesome Grub: Hangry
programme.desc: A survivalist duo has bonded in the mountains of Croatia as they have fought frigid temperatures together. However, as their search for food seems futile and extreme hunger sets in, their relationship is tested and they must consider the alternatives.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dominating the Darkness
programme.desc: The flooded jungles of Belize are determined to frustrate two survivalists. The man-and-woman team face a maze of poisonous snake and rabid bat infested caves all in the name of conquering their fears.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Wretched Wasteland

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Amazon End Zone
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Two survivalists must survive flash floods and heat exhaustion in the jungles of Bolivia. A 'King of the forest' and an endurance athlete take on the Alabama backwoods.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Botswana Breakdown
programme.desc: A Seattle banker and a Rhode Island bartender head to Africa to test their survival skills in the barren plains of Botswana.

programme.desc: Fired Up brings in a rusty, decrepit 1961 Ford Econoline pickup, but when Tom discovers a hidden treasure, he goes searching for legendary Mexican Luchador, Blue Demon Jr. He uncovers more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Truckin' It With Trejo

programme.title: Misfit Garage: The Original Rum Runner
programme.desc: Thom and Tom race out to Georgia to take a hot lap with legendary NASCAR driver Bill Elliot and bring home a '40 Ford Tudor sedan to transform into a vintage Moonshine Runner. But when pressures mount from this high-end hot rod build, tensions boil over.

programme.title: Misfit Garage: Booze in the Hood

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Unfriended
programme.desc: It's the last list race of the season, and that means all the racers are getting ready for their last chance to move up the list. But, after a season of game playing and drama, tension has never been higher between the racers in the 405.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Coming Back to Life
programme.desc: Chief can't refuse an invitation from Boddie to go out West for a race. The OKC racer head out for an epic night of racing with more than $20,000 on the line.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Money

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Bring the Boys Back Home

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Run Like Hell

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: Movie: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: In an island town where the only food source is sardines, a young inventor discovers a way to create new meals. While testing out his invention, it is accidentally launched into the atmosphere and it begins to rain food down on the town.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Everybody Finds Out

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Joey is smitten with his new girlfriend, who has a brutal way of showing affection.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cop
programme.desc: Phoebe uses an NYPD badge she found to bust people for offensive behaviour.

programme.title: Awkwafina Is Nora From Queens: Pilot
programme.desc: Nora takes her first steps toward financial independence, trying her hand at a couple jobs in an attempt to move out of her dad's house.

programme.title: Awkwafina Is Nora From Queens: Atlantic City
programme.desc: Nora and Grandma go to Atlantic City, where Nora gambles and runs into an old acquaintance on the boardwalk, and Grandma and her friends battle to use a casino power outlet.

programme.desc: Rachel is excited about her interview for a position with a famous clothing designer.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Ross finds his flirting skills rusty when he and Chandler vie for the attention of a girl.

programme.title: Mom: Chicken Nuggets and a Triple Homicide

programme.desc: While Christy tries to get to the bottom of Violet's erratic behaviour, Bonnie attempts to get a job.

programme.desc: George seeks help from a popular reality TV game show in order to expose Vic's cheating, gold-digging fiancée.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: To the Extreme!
programme.desc: Danny releases an energy drink into the dinosaurs' water supply, making them extra-energetic and extra dangerous.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mission PAW: Pups Save the Royal Throne
programme.desc: Sweetie plans to steal the actual royal throne, so she can rule.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock/Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Chickaletta's stuck inside Jake's family cuckoo clock as it slides down the mountainside. Ms. Marjorie has mysterious holes appearing all over her yard.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington: Paddington Finds a Hobby/ Paddington and the Stamp
programme.desc: Mrs. Brown figures out what Paddington is good at; Paddington gets his arm stuck in a post box after using a rare stamp on a letter.

programme.title: Ricky Zoom: Tired and True/ Scootio Changes Lanes
programme.desc: Ricky is scared to get his tires changed at Maxwell's, so he pretends he already had a tire change. Scootio wants to show her parents how responsible she is and is given the job of paint crew leader on the school track.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Playful Dragon/ Pups Save the Critters
programme.desc: The pups need to save a playful dragon who's escaped; All of Francois' critters have gotten loose from his unhooked trailer.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a School Day/ Pups Turn on the Lights
programme.desc: Alex loses his back pack on the first day of school. Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to help him find it. Then, it's Chase's birthday and the pups are planning a surprise party. A storm causes the power to go out.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Meet Josh!
programme.desc: Something is missing from Blue’s snack, so we play Blue’s Clues with our new host Josh to find out what it is. With a little help from our old friends Steve and Joe, Josh finds out what Blue wants with her snack.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Parroting Pups/ Merpups Save the Turbots
programme.desc: Rocky loses his voice and can't bark out his puppack tools, but Matea the parrot has no problem doing it for him. The Magical Mer Moon means the Merpups are back, only this time they're helping the PAW Patrol on a rescue.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington Bear: Paddington Finds a Pigeon/ Paddington and the Chores List
programme.desc: Paddington nurses a sick bird named Pigeonton back to health. The family all have chores except Paddington. So as not to be excluded, Mr. Brown creates a list for him to follow, only Paddington picks up the wrong list.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a High Flying Skye/ Pups Go for the Gold
programme.desc: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's Farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely! Uncle Otis is hurling down Jake's Mountain in a runaway mine car.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Deep Sea Grand Prix
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Blaze and AJ are racing under the ocean! Blaze transforms into a submarine and speeds through sunken ships and coral reefs to reach the giant sand castle at the finish line.

programme.title: Ryan's Mystery Playdate: Ryan's Jumpin' Playdate/ Ryan's Twisty Playdate
programme.desc: Ryan boogies through challenges to find out if his mystery playdate can get on up and get down. It's a poppin' good time as Ryan floats through challenges to meet his party-loving playdate.

programme.desc: The Kitty Catastrophe crew gets super powers, and now those little kittens are causing big problems all over town! It'll take the Mighty Pups and their Super Paws to stop them and restore order to Adventure Bay!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: Pups Meet the Mighty Twins/ Save the Mega Mayor
programme.desc: Super-bandit Ladybird shrieks havoc in Adventure Bay, taking all of the town's treasures including Mayor Goodway. The Mighty Pups team up with new super pals The Mighty Twins to save the day, and the Mayor.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Flood Buster
