programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: After Party: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: Joe, Murr and Joey Fatone discuss their past as roommates. Plus, they reveal what they consider to be the stupidest moments on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Cruise

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: Karen Peralta

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Who Arted

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A security breach motivates Kris to step up security. Scott goes to a Lord Disick party in Vegas while Kourtney finds out the baby could come early, and Kim and Khloé put together a last-minute baby shower.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Buggy Boo
programme.desc: The birth of child number three sends Scott spiraling, and Khloé enlists Bruce to help bring Scott back down to earth. Kylie's wish of owning a home comes true and Kim gets an unexpected treat when Kanye shoots a music video with North.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lip Service
programme.desc: The media starts prying into Kylie's beauty secrets and she realizes that she must address her new look. Also, Scott hires Kourtney as an interior designer but when the lines between work and pleasure get blurred, he worries that he has made a mistake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Family Rules
programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Barbara Corcoran from 'Shark Tank' is here to give us financial and career advice. Then, join us as we kick off our week-long countdown to the Oscars.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hearty Home Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the nation for a real-deal taste of home. It's a full hour of comfort classics, cooked up just like it was out of mom's kitchen -- one hearty helping after another.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamite Desserts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's ordering the last course first and diving into a full hour of dynamite desserts. Coast to coast, he'll be grabbing everything from pies to pudding and righteous rolls to frozen favorites.

programme.title: Challenge: Monopoly Cakes
programme.desc: Game on! Challenge celebrates the 85th anniversary of one of the world's most-popular board games, Monopoly. Ian Ziering challenges four skilled cake artists to create iconic anniversary cakes that have it all, from treasured game pieces to Park Place.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Big Game Day
programme.desc: Four sports-loving chefs gear up for some tailgating, Flavortown-style. The first game has them shopping for appetizer ingredients in roller coolers, and then Guy Fieri holds a draft for the main ingredients in the chefs' burgers.

programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and chef Giada De Laurentiis teams up again to bring the heat to Bobby Flay's kitchen. The dynamic duo has recruited Indian chef Paddy Rawal and Caribbean specialist chef Trey Lamont to set Bobby's kitchen ablaze.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Life Support

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Destiny

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a journey through New England's White Mountains. After being dropped from a helicopter, Don and Bear use a deer antler to cross a raging river, rappel a massive cliff and attempt a climb to the top of a railroad bridge.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Michael B. Jordan joins Bear for an epic adventure in Wales. Forced to battle the elements, the two must contend with copious amounts of wind and rain and have to get creative to find shelter for the evening and food for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Actor Joseph Gordon-Levitt tackles Kenya's unyielding terrain with Bear Grylls. After dropping in from a helicopter, the two navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for needed hydration and ascend a rock dome that tests Joseph's fear of heights.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on an epic journey through the Bulgarian outback. The duo must rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river and descend into a dark cave to survive their journey.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Nick Jonas

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Bear takes Hollywood bad girl Michelle Rodriguez to one of the harshest deserts in North America for a rigorous and scenic adventure.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: James Marsden

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Is There an Edge to the Universe?
programme.desc: Groundbreaking cosmology and state of the art telescopes now suggest the universe has a finite size and a unique shape. If this is true there must be an edge to the Universe, and something beyond.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: The Riddle of Black Holes
programme.desc: Astronomers now think there are billions of black holes, swallowing up planets and stars in violent feeding frenzies, and that reality may take place on a two-dimensional hologram at the edge of the universe.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Will We Survive First Contact?
programme.desc: Mankind longs for proof that we are not alone in the universe, but the moment of first contact will certainly mean the end of the world as we know it.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: What Do Aliens Look Like?
programme.desc: Across the galaxy lie exotic worlds made entirely of water or stewing with poisonous gas. We can only speculate at what kinds of creatures inhabit these places.

programme.title: Through the Wormhole: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: We're only just developing instruments powerful enough to scan for aliens. One leading astronomer believes she may already have heard a hint of their first efforts to communicate.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Japanese Death Match
programme.desc: Liz and Martin visit Japan, to witness the battle that rages between the people and the land they live on. But how much of a threat do Japan's volcanoes, earthquakes and tsunamis pose?

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Asteroid Armageddon
programme.desc: Martin and Liz investigate a giant asteroid impact that may have wiped out the dinosaurs 65 million years ago. Martin experiences the power of a NASA supergun, and Liz follows the geological clues to Mexico where she dives an underground river.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Ice Age or Hell Fire?
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, explore North America to find evidence of the most powerful geological events the Earth has ever seen Ice Ages. Finding out how they have both carved the land but also moulded the life that lives on it.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: The Rockies Built the Atom Bomb
programme.desc: Geologist, Martin Pepper, and biologist, Liz Bonnin, travel to the iconic Rocky Mountains, to reveal the extraordinary link between the Rockies' soaring peaks and the uranium that ended up in 'Little Boy', the atomic bomb detonated over the Japanese city.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Hawaii Sink L.A.?
programme.desc: Liz and Martin travel to the tropical paradise of Hawaii to investigate how evidence of catastrophic events in its geological past reveal a pattern of destruction that stretches back millions of years.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Can Krakatoa Stop Time?
programme.desc: An active volcano with the power to plunge the whole world into a brutal dark age is rising from the sea in the heart of the Asia. It's done it before, and it will erupt again.

programme.title: How the Earth Works: Will Europe Burn in Hell?
programme.desc: Biologist Liz Bonnin and Geologist Martin Pepper investigate the world's most dangerous volcano Mount Vesuvius only to discover that the three million people of Naples live in the shadow of another, much more deadly super volcano, called Campi Flegre.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Tommy and his team are back on the trail of a dangerous fugitive who was convicted for armed robbery and assault, and was deported over ten years ago.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance
programme.desc: Two armed and masked intruders barge into a family home demanding money, and threaten to kill the children. The police search for one of the suspects - an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: One to Go
programme.desc: Federal authorities in Puerto Rico completed a major drug offensive against a notorious gang with 71 people facing indictment, but they failed to capture one of the alleged leaders.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chinatown Takedown
programme.desc: An immigrant accused of viciously murdering his own family may be hiding out in Manhattan's Chinatown neighbourhood.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Bronx Boys
programme.desc: Two friends from the South Bronx go on a crime spree that is increasingly more violent with each offence.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Vinny knows all to well that criminals who go missing, often are the most dangerous.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: On the Stroll
programme.desc: Task Force is looking for a woman promoting prostitution of young children.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: American Justice: Framed
programme.desc: The shocking story of Clarence Brandley, an innocent man convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, a man is shot by someone he trusts and Kim and Audrey must wait until the gunman is apprehended before they can begin treatment.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Guardians of the City
programme.desc: Titus and Dan treat a woman who was viciously stabbed in the face, and Holly and Nick tend to an emotional young transgendered woman who was assaulted. A wild police chase ends with a major car accident.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: 60 Days In: New Sheriff in Town
programme.desc: Newly elected sheriff Mark Lamb sends six volunteers into the Pinal County Detention Center on a mission to uncover valuable Intel about the gangs, drugs and operational issues that plague his facility.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Straight Cholo
programme.desc: Sheriff Lamb's mission-based program increases its momentum and members, as two more participants are set to join the three already incarcerated.

programme.title: Death of a Lineman
programme.desc: 22-year-old Marlin Barnes, a linebacker for the University of Miami, is found dead in an apartment, along with his friend 22-year-old Timwanika Lumpkins. Detectives must trace both victims' footsteps in the previous weeks to find the killer.

programme.title: Fall of a Football Star
programme.desc: Rae Carruth, once thought to be a rising star in the NFL, has a hard fall from grace when he conspires to have his pregnant girlfriend, Cherica Adams, murdered.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Darkest of Nights
programme.desc: In 2004, the small town of Craig, Alaska is shocked when police discover the charred body of beloved mother and wife Lauri Waterman. People have no idea who would want to kill her, until an unlikely witness reveals a sordid story of secrets and lies.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In 1984 ten-year-old Kevin Collins disappears on his way home and the city of San Francisco is galvanized in an effort to find him. With few leads to go on, Kevin's case sheds light on hundreds of other kids who have vanished without a trace in the U.S.

programme.title: Sean Taylor: Murder of a Football Legend
programme.desc: When star NFL player Sean Taylor is murdered in his Miami home following a home invasion, investigators must separate truth from lies to solve the horrific crime.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Murder in Coralville
programme.desc: A young woman is found shot to death off the side of a dirt road. Police hope their best clue, the bullet found at the scene, will unmask her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police struggle to find a vicious killer despite having DNA evidence and a videotape of the suspect.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Classified Murder
programme.desc: Police investigating a couple's mysterious disappearance uncover a trail of terrifying clues.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Mystery in Indio
programme.desc: As investigators study the chilling crime scene inside Wendi Brant's horse ranch, one thing seems clear, the 45-year-old had been brutally killed by someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Secret to Kill For
programme.desc: An Air Force Major is found beaten to death outside his home, leaving police, and the military, to piece together the crime and find his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trouble in Quitman
programme.desc: When police find a mother and her son shot to death in their home in a small town in Texas, questions arise over whether the husband may have been behind the deaths.

programme.title: Dateline: The Feud
programme.desc: Even in a peaceful place, like just south of Glacier National Park in Montana, tempers can flare and personalities will clash.

programme.title: Dateline: The Dream House Mystery
programme.desc: A realtor lands her dream assignment, but turns up dead on the job.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hitman 4 Hire
programme.desc: Leslie and Brian Long live in an affluent suburban of St. Clairsville, Ohio with their two beautiful kids. When Leslie goes online to make business contacts, the family is besieged with mysterious threats, and Bryan is almost killed by an unknown gunman.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Job of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Unemployed David Pauley applies to a Craigslist ad offering a tantalizing lifeline just as the recession hits. The job sounds perfect: a live-in caretaker for a ranch in Ohio. But just as soon as he is hired, he disappears - and he isn't the first.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler: The Downfall
programme.desc: The final episode explores Hitler's mental and physical decline as he is forced to confront the endgame of inevitable defeat. When Hitler miraculously survives an assassination attempt, his lust for vengeance triggers an unequalled reign of terror.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hardcore Heroes: For a Greater Cause
programme.desc: George Rowe is a former criminal who goes undercover to bust a motorcycle gang, and the Masin brothers lead a resistance cell against Communist oppression in Czechoslovakia.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus
programme.desc: Nostradamus' prophecies have predicted some of the most dramatic and tragic events in history with chilling accuracy, and the worst to come. There are many among his followers who say that he was not sealing us to this fate, but warning us against it.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yurts So Good
programme.desc: Follow a young couple as they prep their own land and break ground to build their ultimate luxury yurt in the woods of Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cliff House
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliffside retreat for a family wanting to reconnect in the Sierra Nevada Mountains. But for Gregg and his team, building in the middle of nowhere presents its challenges.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Neglected Craftsman Gets New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee just bought a home that desperately needs help and Ally Mahon is up for the challenge. Ally is determined to take their fixer-upper and turn it into a beautiful new home for their growing family.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Victorian Upgrade
programme.desc: Ally helps a pair of homeowners upgrade their old Victorian home with a new front porch and a complete kitchen makeover. With a limited budget, Ally definitely has her work cut out for her, and the winter weather isn't doing her any favors either.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Scandinavian Style Makeover
programme.desc: Ally gets a call to update and expand a vintage farmhouse for a family of six, including a more functional master bathroom with a sauna, and a more spacious and modern kitchen. With her skills for repurposing, she might just be able to pull it off.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: 1920s Fixer-Upper Gets a Chic Kitchen and Bedroom Renovation
programme.desc: After purchasing a fixer-upper that turned out to be more than she could handle, a new homeowner calls on Ally to help update her kitchen and bedroom to match her style.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Mid-century Masculine
programme.desc: A single father returns home from being deployed overseas hoping Ally can help him turn his ranch-style house into a family home for him and his two boys. Ally also reinvents the boys' bedrooms using reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Craftsman Inside and Out
programme.desc: Newlyweds ask Ally to build them a Craftsman kitchen that matches the rest of their house. While she's at it, they've also asked her to turn their mud pit of a backyard into one that's fit for entertaining.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: French Country Revival
programme.desc: A couple calls on Ally to help them celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary by renovating their beloved home. When she starts ripping out the 1920's farmhouse's walls she finds several surprises that slow her progress.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Colonial Meets Art Deco
programme.desc: After buying the vintage home of their dreams, a couple's plans of renovating fell by the wayside and they need help getting back on track. Ally's plans incorporate restored antique pieces while playing on the existing art deco accents.

programme.title: Restored: 1928 Spanish Colonial Mansion
programme.desc: Brett thinks he finally gets an easy restoration job on a stunning Spanish Colonial hillside mansion until he finds out it has a pink Victorian kitchen. Then he uncovers hidden treasure on the old woodwork but the homeowners don't share his excitement.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1930 Simple Spanish Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett helps a recently-divorced mom who is in over her head with her cute Spanish bungalow in Riverside, California. He opts for a simplistic approach in his restoration of the exterior areas and kitchen.

programme.title: Restored: 1952 Midcentury Masterpiece
programme.desc: A couple wants to renovate their mid-century modern California ranch home but are not sure where to begin. Brett works to blend her traditional style with his more modern tastes for an extensive and unique remodel.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Barbie
programme.desc: Four returning champions compete to be part of the celebrations around Barbie's new dream house.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California State Fair/ Northeast State Fair
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chows down on a lobster corn dog in California, and tries a deep fried peanut butter and banana sandwich in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Hyderabad
programme.desc: Andrew explores the aromatic treasures of Hyderabad, India. From savory potato pastries and silver-garnished syrupy fried bread to spicy pancakes and hearty meals of meat and rice, Hyderabad's menus are fit for royalty.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Food Paradise: College Town Cravings
programme.desc: These eateries serve up delicious food and awesome service near America's colleges and universities, from an iconic burger shop steps away from Harvard University to a beloved breakfast joint just off the University of Minnesota campus.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Brew and Chew
programme.desc: The best bar food at the some of the best small breweries across the country is highlighted. From ale-glazed wings to beer-braised pork shoulder, beer has gone from a frosty sidekick to a key ingredient, and diners are ready to drink it all in.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Papa's Pizza
programme.desc: Laura makes some of her dad's favorites before he joins her in the kitchen for a pizza throw down. First up Sal's grilled seafood salad with calamari and shrimp, next it's a classic margherita pizza.

programme.title: Simply Laura: The Little Black Dress Ingredient
programme.desc: Laura Vitale is on the hunt for a versatile little black dress for upcoming events, and this inspires her to repurpose her dinner plans! She makes marinara sauce her culinary little black dress, accessorizing it in dishes like Italian pot roast.

programme.title: Simply Laura: 15-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Laura has a busy day and only has 15 minutes for each of her meals.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Laura Vitale hosts a casual game night. Everyone has a job to do, including Papa Sal, who joins Laura to prepare his spicy steamed mussels. Her guests make their selections from the classic Italian antipasti and enjoy short rib and béchamel lasagna.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Italian Girl in the Garden State
programme.desc: Growing up in Italy, vegetables were the star of Laura Vitale's plates and now, she has recipes to turn local New Jersey veggies into standing ovation dishes.

programme.title: Simply Laura: One-Pot Meals
programme.desc: Laura Vitale creates some comforting one-pot meals for her cousin Kate and her husband, who are adjusting to life with a new baby.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Wine Country
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay's brunch vibe is all about the wine for this wine country themed menu.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bread-Y for Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: New Orleans Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a culinary walk through New Orleans' French Quarter for this brunch that's perfect anytime of the day.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Winter Weekend Brunch
programme.desc: It may be chilly outside his kitchen, but inside Bobby Flay prepares a warm and hearty brunch that's perfect for entertaining on those cold weekend mornings.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked and Stacked

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob

programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo's and Rolly's Birthday / Electric Pugaloo
programme.desc: It's the pups' birthday! Bob learns to dance.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keep On Food Truckin'/ Pupigan's Island
programme.desc: The pugs plan to bring Bob's favorite food truck back to him but Cupcake and Rufus have a different plan. Bob and the pups are on a whale tour when their boat runs into an island.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Valentine Surprise/ Bright Lights, Pup City
programme.desc: The pups look for Valentine's Day gifts for Bob and Chloe; Bob is sad when the Symphony of Lights is canceled, so the pups try to fix the lights.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: A Very Sticky Problem/ Forward Marsh
programme.desc: Mazu sees life through a raptor’s eyes when she gets stuck to Cror by some tar. Rocky hopes to get the best viewing spot to watch the "winter lights" dance across the night sky.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Mazu Takes a Chance/ The Lost Egg
programme.desc: Mazu must protect a helpless dragonfly from raptors; Rocky learns how to be gentle with an egg he's found.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Wild Tire/ Sittin' Kitty
programme.desc: Mickey tries to surprise racing champion Jiminy Johnson with a tire from his first roadster. Minnie and Daisy wind up on a search throughout Hot Dog Hills when the cat they are pet-sitting escapes.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Armadylan Action Hero/Super Muscles Show Off
programme.desc: Ninja uses Armadylan's dream of becoming a kung fu movie star to break into a museum. While Gekko and Armadylan guard the city, their watch turns into a contest of who's strongest!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: It's Pony: Nosy Pony/ Beatrice
programme.desc: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger. When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony than she is.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Add-a-Dad/ Squirrely Puffs
programme.desc: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up 'a-lot-a-dads' to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Turner and Pooch/ Dumbbell Curve
programme.desc: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy's house. Realizing it's Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. Crocker grades on a bell curve so Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/ Crock Blocked
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form. Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Mr. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Swing It Like a Boss!
programme.desc: A family of wrestlers tackle the Maze's four immersive zones in spectacular games that include a crystal-eating dragon and a tricky pipe puzzle.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: The Walls Are Closing In!
programme.desc: The Blair family takes on Maze Master Adam Conover's mind-bending games. They must beat challenges like the Shrinking Room to win a chance at up to $25,000.

programme.title: The Substitute: The Bella Twins
programme.desc: WWE Superstar Nikki Bella turns into three quirky characters: a dog trainer-turned-gym teacher, a Bridesmaidzilla, and a clown doubling as a career counselor. Her sister Brie Bella plays puppet master as Nikki goes undercover as The Substitute.

programme.title: The Substitute: John Cena
programme.desc: John Cena is transformed by a team of special effects artists to go undercover as a substitute teacher.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Old Parent
programme.desc: Poof finally becomes a fairy godparent. Unfortunately, it's to Mrs. Crocker.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Knitwits/ Dimmsdale's Got Talent?
programme.desc: Dad takes Mom on what he thinks is a knight-themed cruise to renew their vows, but it's really a knitting cruise. Mr. Bickels hosts a talent show and everyone gets in, but Timmy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jailbreak/ Evil Spatula
programme.desc: Plankton is in jail and plans to break out with the help of his fellow inmates. SpongeBob's spatula breaks so he replaces it with one of Plankton's.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Thru/ The Hot Shot
programme.desc: Instead of paying to patch up a hole in the wall, Mr. Krabs decides to use it to make more money by turning it into a drive-thru window. Tony Fast, Jr., the son of a famous race car driver, teaches SpongeBob how to drive.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Staycation/ Walking the Plankton
programme.desc: Patrick wants to take a vacation, but can't afford one, so SpongeBob comes up with a solution: a staycation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples / Home Sweet Rubble
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free Krabby Patties to win back customers after Plankton drives them away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Treats!/ For Here or to Go
programme.desc: Gary goes crazy over the new snail treats SpongeBob brought home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: In order to increase profits, Krabs decides that the Krusty Krab will now be open 24 hours a day. He orders SpongeBob and Squidward to work all night - what's known as the Graveyard Shift.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Pat takes SpongeBob on as his role model; Bob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped
programme.desc: Bob and Patrick sneak inside Sandy's treedome while she's hibernating; Gary seems to like Patrick better than SpongeBob, so Bob becomes jealous and buys other pets to get Gary back.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Tips and Techniques to Help Improve Your Home

programme.title: The Closer: Old Money
programme.desc: One of Brenda's detectives is ambushed on the street and the main clue to figuring out the motive behind the attack is a garbage bag containing more than $37,500.

programme.title: The Closer: High Crimes
programme.desc: Chief of police Tommy Delk assigns Major Crimes a seemingly minor case involving the armed robbery of several medical marijuana dispensaries. When one of the robberies turns into a murder, the case tests Brenda's readiness to move up in the department.

programme.title: The Closer: Living Proof
programme.desc: A long-brewing feud leads to a stabbing on Christmas Eve and the accidental death of a patriarch in a case that threatens to derail everyone's holiday plans. Brenda is especially put out since her parents are in town with a special announcement.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Tell Me Sweet Little Lies
programme.desc: Christina is hesitant to move in with Burke, and George threatens to move out unless Meredith gets rid of their dog. Meanwhile, Alex gets his board-exam results, Meredith takes a blood test for Alzheimer's, and Bailey begins to have contractions.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Break on Through
programme.desc: The nurses at Seattle Grace Hospital go on strike, leaving the doctors to fend for themselves. Meredith's mistake in treating an elderly patient is brought to light by the patient's friends. Meanwhile, Izzy treats a pregnant teen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: It's the End of the World
programme.desc: Meredith's fear that she's in for a bad day when a medical case arrives at Seattle Grace that threatens the lives of everyone in the operating room.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Altar Ego
programme.desc: Doug and the guys take a trip to try and stop Spence's ex-girlfriend from getting married.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Icky Shuffle
programme.desc: Doug agrees to team-up with Arthur for the senior centre's shuffleboard tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awful Bigamy
programme.desc: Doug is reluctant to let Holly move in with them after she gets kicked out of her place.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lost Vegas
programme.desc: Doug's plans to earn brownie points by taking Carrie to a spa lands him in hot water.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond

programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Biggest Street Race Ever
programme.desc: JJ Da Boss has invited 8-street racing teams from around the country to Memphis for a chance to win $100,000. A win won't come without a fight, though, as South Carolina's small-tire racers and St. Louis high-dollar drivers are ready for war.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: David meet Goliath
programme.desc: The heat is on as the South Carolina underdogs bring the fight to the St. Louis crew. It's all on display as mouthy leadership, fired-up tempers, and high pressure situations dominate a tension-filled night.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: We Got Bad Blood
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: Kye Kelley and his NOLA racers take on Birdman and his team from Texas, and things get heated. The rivals' history of bad blood boils over when NOLA has car trouble, and Texas refuses to play nice.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: First-Round Knockout
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The war continues between Team NOLA and Texas as they battle to see who can race best under pressure. The team who can stay focused on the street stands the best chance of winning.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: North vs. South
programme.desc: Chris Rankin and his ragtag team from the Northeast land in Memphis to take on Quinn's family of racers from Kentucky. Big-money cars and even bigger egos collide on the streets to create the perfect storm of high-speed strategy and chaos.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Round and Around
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN invite all the 405 racers out to Willow Springs International Raceway for a road race competition. The racers have to pair up to compete in a time attack competition where the pair with the fastest combined times will take home $10,000.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: North vs. South
programme.desc: Chris Rankin and his ragtag team from the Northeast land in Memphis to take on Quinn's family of racers from Kentucky. Big-money cars and even bigger egos collide on the streets to create the perfect storm of high-speed strategy and chaos.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
programme.desc: Ryan Martin looks over his car while Chief and Dave push each other in a competitive testing session, as they all get ready for another chance at number one. At race time, the racers fight to move up the list until broken cars slow everyone down.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey: One Wrong Step
programme.desc: While vacationing in South Africa, Peter Knottenbelt suddenly finds himself in the jaws of a massive crocodile. In Nova Scotia, Meg Doyle is walking her beloved dog when they're suddenly ambushed by a pair of angry raccoons.

programme.title: I Was Prey: All Alone
programme.desc: During an archery hunt in Cranbrook, British Columbia, Chad Dueck comes face-to-face with a mother grizzly bear. In Tracy, California, Walt Dean King is savagely attacked by a Brahma Bull roaming his neighborhood.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Night Terror
programme.desc: On family trip to the Canadian wilderness, 12-year-old Zac Delventhal is dragged from his sleeping bag by a hungry wolf. While swimming in the Pacific Ocean, Maria Korcsmaros is attacked by a Great White shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: On a family trip to Pattaya, Thailand, Helen Costigan is attending an elephant show when one of the massive beasts turns deadly. Golf ball recovery specialist Scott Lahodik is diving in a Florida lake when he's attacked by a vicious alligator.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: Sandy Prince is swimming in an African river when she's attacked by a massive crocodile. While mountain-biking in Washington State, Phil Anderson comes face to face with a hungry cougar.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mauled in the Mountains
programme.desc: Louie van Grootel is working in the Canadian wilderness when he's attacked by a massive grizzly bear. In Colorado, Travis Kauffman is trail-running and comes face to face with a hungry mountain lion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape Through a Toilet
programme.desc: Lifelong pals and criminals Timothy Fletcher and Doni Brown break out of a Florida prison in 2009. Anxious for freedom, the two need money. A robbery that ends in murder puts them on most wanted lists and leads cops on a manhunt across the Southeast.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Home to Mother
programme.desc: After getting handed a stiff sentence for robbery, Robert Nielsen flees the brutality of prison by escaping and living under the radar with his family in California. But even they can't shield the young fugitive from the challenges of being on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Crawl My Way to Freedom
programme.desc: After a botched robbery, Darryl Norris faces murder charges and a long prison sentence. He pulls off a brilliant escape through the ceiling of his cell and plans to flee the country. But authorities are determined to find him and lock him up for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Daddy Dearest
programme.desc: Emily and her very opinionated father want the perfect princess ball gown for her big day. Bride Danielle's father passed away, and she hopes to find a gown he would have loved.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Designer Dreams
programme.desc: Liz is in the salon with Danielle Jonas, and wants to show off her new body. Courtney Cason said yes to Mark Zunino's sketch, but now it's time to try on the real gown. Jillian wants a fashion forward dress but her mom isn't making it easy.

programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.desc: In Kotzebue, Sgt. Norman Hughes gets more than he bargained for on a domestic violence call while Ofc. Robert Odom faces the dangers of working alone.

programme.desc: In Fairbanks, a wanted fugitive flees into the woods--and the police's only lead is frozen footprints in the snow. When a killer bear becomes loose in Kodiak, officers must hunt it down--before it kills again.

programme.title: The First 48: Under One Roof/ Off Target
programme.desc: A grandfather is robbed and murdered in his bedroom for a 26-inch TV. Also, a drive-by shooting in Overtown left an innocent young woman dead.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: Find out which joker ran for Congress as a write-in candidate, which joker was a top-notch salesman before starting the show and who had a job in finance.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Budget, Big Style
programme.desc: A local business owner is looking to buy a starter home within walking distance to town with character, has plenty of space for her dog and fits her thrifty all-in budget.

programme.title: Home Town: History in the Making
programme.desc: After moving to New York City to pursue his architect career, Bill is ready to settle down with his fiance Jody in the small town he's loved since childhood.

programme.title: Home Town: Porch Dreams

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Historic Home Overhaul
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs transform the a family's historic, 1893 house. From turning an attic space into two bedrooms to completely renovating the kitchen and living area, they pull out all the stops to give the family of five their first home.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover

programme.title: HGTV Dream Home

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Dreary Home Gets Bright Update

programme.title: Movie: The Tender Trap

programme.title: Movie: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: A bachelor party, that includes a round of clubs and dirty movies, soon turns dark.

programme.title: Movie: Some Like It Hot

programme.title: Movie: The Great Race

programme.title: Movie: The North Star

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case
programme.desc: Severide is brought in for questioning after his car is found to have caused a deadly accident. As the investigation gets underway, the team uncovers a group of car-jackers may be the key to Severide's innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
